sevenDay.synopsis: The week is off to a great start with VFR conditions dominating the LFA! We should remain VFR thru the forecast period. As far as hazards, the only thing I'm seeing is a low-end chance of PM showers/ISOLD TS for tomorrow, Wednesday, and especially Friday.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 30 MAR - 05 APR
